---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CloudAI Fusion
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, diagrams, references to similar features in other projects, etc.
